data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Diff is limited to scripts/install.sh usage() help rendering on commit 63c9ce7. The implementation replaces the heredoc with printf-based formatting, uses existing supports_color/color_code helpers, and falls back to plain text when color is unavailable. Manual TTY validation confirmed colored Usage/Commands output and plain output with NO_COLOR. Sanity gates in /private/tmp/foolery-76ec passed: bun run lint (warnings only, exit 0), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
